title: Why Money Makes Predictions More Accurate | The Kalshi Story
summary: The video explores how financial incentives improve prediction accuracy, using Kalshi as a case study. Kalshi is a prediction market platform that enables users to make bets on outcomes, which creates monetary motivation for accurate forecasting.
